understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based level, modifying the player's carried piece (shape, color, rotation) using modifier tiles so that it matches the requirements of one or more goal cells, then stepping onto each goal cell to complete all goals and advance to the next level, ultimately completing all levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player moves one tile per turn using cardinal directions (north, south, east, west) at a cost of 1 stamina per move. Walls block movement and are listed as 'blocked_directions' each turn. The piece has three attributes: shape (0-5), color (cycling orange->blue->green->red->orange), and rotation (0°, 90°, 180°, 270° cycling clockwise). Stepping on modifier tiles (shape, color, rotation) immediately cycles or rotates the piece accordingly. A goal cell requires the piece to exactly match its shape, color, and rotation to become active; stepping on an activated goal completes it. Stamina reaching 0 costs a life and resets stamina; losing all lives ends the game in GAME_OVER. The recent actions show successful east and north movements without hitting walls or goals, indicating navigation toward a target.
